title: Doccla - Virtual Ward Remote Patient Monitoring
problem: Hospital capacity is limited. Many patients could be safely monitored at home but hospitals lack infrastructure for remote patient monitoring (RPM).
solution: Virtual ward platform providing patients with connected devices (blood pressure, pulse oximeter, etc.) that feed data to clinical dashboards for remote monitoring.
technology: IoT devices, cloud platform, clinical dashboards, EHR integration
regulatory_notes: Medical device accessories, data handling compliance with NHS standards.
varden_fit: Moderate — RPM infrastructure complements primary care. Could integrate with Varden clinics for post-discharge monitoring. Different market (hospital vs primary care).
notes: Virtual wards were accelerated by COVID. Growing segment in UK/EU healthcare.
